meaning: n.血块,淤血,(帆或裙上缝的)三角形布vt.缝以补裆,刺伤,顶
examples: The press release provoked furious protests from the Gore camp and other top Democrats.
During one lunch period, my friend Denny and I went to the Graben Gore Restaurant to have a hotdog.
Al gore calls global warming an "inconvenient truth," as if merely recognizing it could put us on a path to a solution.
We think Al Gore would agree - it is an inconvenient truth that can no longer be ignored.
An inconvenient truth, not adequately addressed by Al Gore in his movie, is that environmentalism makes life complicated.
